name: LASKER
description: LASKER: fair-play chess coach for chess.com. Two surfaces that don't overlap: Analyze (engine review with slim opening pill, a single best-move arrow that ONLY ever points for the student's own side, a last-move card that also shows the engine's preferred move and the missed eval, and a session summary with accuracy + move-quality counts) and Learn (curated Opening Library + directive Study mode with takeback-safe position-hash sync, engine fully off). Clean-state button wipes timeline/study/engine cache in one click. Drawer leaves a 140px strip at the bottom of the viewport so chess.com's move-nav controls stay clickable. Bundled Space Grotesk typeface. Automatically disabled on live/daily games, puzzles, and anywhere else real play happens.
